message.content:
I need to embed a custom animated video/visualization component into the CitedBy.ai landing page. Explore:

1. Read `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\Home.tsx` FULLY — I need to understand the exact structure, all sections, where a video/animation section could be inserted (likely after the hero section or between sections).

2. Read `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\App.tsx` lines 1-50 to see how Home is rendered.

3. Check what animation/canvas libraries are available in `package.json`.

4. Check if there are any existing canvas or animation components in `components/`.

5. Check `globals.css` or any CSS files for existing animation keyframes.

Give me:
- The exact JSX structure of Home.tsx section by section with line numbers
- Where the best insertion point would be for a large animated visualization
- What animation dependencies are available
- Existing animation patterns/keyframes in the CSS

content.text:
Perfect! I have all the information you need. Let me compile a comprehensive exploration report: --- ## COMPREHENSIVE EXPLORATION REPORT: Custom Animated Video/Visualization Component Integration ### 1. HOME.TSX STRUCTURE (885 lines total) **Exact JSX Section Breakdown with Line Numbers:** | Section | Lines | Description | |---------|-------|-------------| | **Imports & Types** | 1-11 | React imports, Lucide icons (31 icons), User type, ScoreRing component, Answer-First audit service | | **Component Props** | 7-11 | `HomeProps` interface: `onNavigate`, `user`, `onDirectRecharge?` | | **State Management** | 13-26 | Free audit state: `brandName`, `siteUrl`, `isAnalyzing`, `auditResult`, `auditError`, `resultsRef`, `freeAuditUsed` | | **E-E-A-T Pillars Logic** | 28-34 | Derives 4 pillars (Experience, Expertise, Authority, Trust) from audit categories | | **Handlers & Utilities** | 36-120 | `handleFreeAudit()`, `getScoreLabel()`, `getScoreColor()`, `getBarColor()`, `handleStartAnalysis()`, `handleSelectPlan()` | | **Plans Data** | 122-150 | 3 pricing plans: Le Jerrican (50 GTO, €15), La Pompe (200 GTO, €49, popular), La Citerne (1000 GTO, €199) | | | | | | **HERO SECTION** | 155-189 | Ambient glow gradient • Badge ("Plateforme AEO/GEO") • H1 title • Subtitle • 3 CTA buttons (Free Audit, Explore Directory, Join Waitlist) | | **AEO/GEO EXPLANATION** | 191-290 | Section header • Definition paragraph • SEO vs AEO comparison (2-card grid) • 6 AI Engine cards (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, AI Overviews) • CTA scroll button | | **FREE SCORE SECTION** | 292-512 | ⭐ **KEY SECTION** • GRATUIT badge • H2 "Votre Score de Visibilité IA" • Form (2 inputs: brand name, URL) • Error handling • Submit button with loading states • Loading animation (spinner + pulsing tags) • Results section (ScoreRing, E-E-A-T pillars, summary, recommendations, CTA card) | | **STATS BAR** | 514-528 | 4 stat cards with staggered animation: 50%, 24h, 0, 3x | | **FEATURES GRID** | 530-568 | 3 feature cards: Perception Simulator, Semantic Code, Indexed Directory | | **PARADIGM SHIFT** | 570-634 | "Le Changement de Paradigme" section • VS badge center • SEO Classic vs AEO/GEO comparison (2 cards) | | **3 PILLARS** | 636-677 | "Les 3 Piliers de l'Autorité IA" • 3 cards: Identity (Graph), Semantics (RAG), Ubiquity (Signal) with hover glow | | **PROCESS SECTION** | 679-729 | Gradient border container • 3-step timeline: Analysis → Source of Truth → Continuous Monitoring | | **TESTIMONIALS** | 731-801 | 3 testimonial cards with ratings • Trust badges (RGPD, SSL, Uptime, Support, Made in France) | | **PRICING SECTION** | 803-879 | Background glow • H2 "Rechargez votre GTO Gas" • 3 pricing plan cards (with popular badge & scale) • CTA buttons | | **Closing** | 880-885 | End return & export | --- ### 2. APP.TSX HOME RENDERING (Lines 1-50) **How Home is integrated:** ```typescript // Line 6: Direct import (NOT lazy-loaded) import Home from './pages/Home'; // Later in render logic (not shown in first 50 lines, but standard pattern): {currentView === 'home' && ( )} ``` **Key observation:** Home is a **direct import** (not lazy-loaded), meaning it's in the critical path. It's rendered conditionally based on `currentView === 'home'`. --- ### 3. ANIMATION/CANVAS LIBRARIES AVAILABLE **From `package.json` (Dependencies):** | Library | Version | Purpose | Capabilities | |---------|---------|---------|--------------| | **React** | ^18 | Core framework | Hooks (useState, useRef, useCallback) already used | | **Recharts** | ^2.12.7 | Chart library | Composable charts (LineChart, AreaChart, etc.) | | **Lucide-react** | ^0.378.0 | Icon library | SVG icons with animatable strokes/fills | | **html2canvas** | ^1.4.1 | HTML to image | Screenshot generation | | **jsPDF** | ^4.1.0 | PDF generation | PDF export with embedded visuals | **Notable MISSING libraries:** - No Canvas.js, Three.js, Babylon.js, or D3.js - No animation libraries (Framer Motion, React Spring, GSAP) - No WebGL libraries **Implication:** You'll need to either: 1. Embed animation via pure CSS3 + inline styles 2. Add a lightweight canvas library (e.g., `three.js` for 3D, or `lottie-react` for JSON animations) 3. Use SVG + CSS animations (Recharts supports this) --- ### 4. EXISTING COMPONENTS & ANIMATION PATTERNS **Components in `/components/` directory:** | Component | Purpose | Animation Usage | |-----------|---------|-----------------| | **ScoreRing.tsx** | Circular progress indicator | Likely has SVG stroke animation | | **CategoryCard.tsx** | Card component | Standard hover effects | | **RecommendationCard.tsx** | Card wrapper | Standard hover effects | | **ToastSystem.tsx** | Toast notifications | Slide-in/fade animations | | **GenerationModal.tsx** | Modal for content generation | Scale-in animations | | **LanguageCitationMatrix.tsx** | Data matrix display | Possible staggered row animations | | **ScoreProjection.tsx** | Score visualization | Animated progress bars | | **ShortcutsModal.tsx** | Keyboard shortcuts overlay | Modal animations | | **CommandPalette.tsx** | Command search UI | Slide/fade animations | | **StripeCheckout.tsx** | Payment form | Form transitions | **No dedicated animation/visualization components found** (canvas, Three.js, custom SVG animations). --- ### 5. EXISTING CSS ANIMATIONS IN `globals.css` **Keyframes & Animation Classes (Lines 215-396):** ```css /* FOUNDATIONAL KEYFRAMES */ @keyframes fadeInUp { /* opacity: 0 → 1, translateY(8px) → 0 */ } @keyframes fade-in { /* opacity: 0 → 1 */ } @keyframes zoom-in { /* scale(0.95) → 1 */ } @keyframes slide-in-from-bottom { /* translateY(8px) + opacity */ } @keyframes slide-in-from-right { /* translateX(20px) + opacity */ } @keyframes fade-up-in { /* opacity + translateY */ } /* UTILITY ANIMATIONS */ @keyframes shimmer { /* background-position sweep (1.8s infinite) */ } @keyframes staggerSlideUp { /* opacity 0 → 1, translateY(12px) → 0 */ } @keyframes scaleIn { /* opacity + scale(0.95 → 1) */ } /* MICRO-INTERACTIONS */ @keyframes pulseDot { /* opacity: 1 → 0.5, scale: 1 → 1.5 → 1 (2s) */ } @keyframes smoothSpin { /* rotate(0deg) → 360deg (0.8s linear) */ } /* CSS CLASSES */ .page-enter { animation: fadeInUp 0.2s ease-out; } .animate-in { animation: fade-in 0.5s ease-out, zoom-in 0.3s ease-out; } .animate-slide-up { animation: slide-in-from-bottom 0.3s ease-out; } .animate-slide-right { animation: slide-in-from-right 0.3s ease-out; } .animate-fade-up { animation: fade-up-in 0.25s ease-out; } .skeleton-shimmer { animation: shimmer 1.8s ease-in-out infinite; } .stagger-enter { animation: staggerSlideUp 0.3s ease-out forwards; } .scale-enter { animation: scaleIn 0.15s ease-out; } /* MICRO-INTERACTIONS */ .hover-lift { transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .hover-lift:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px; } .press-effect:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .glow-accent:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 24px -4px rgba(97, 0, 223, 0.5); } .pulse-dot { animation: pulseDot 2s ease-in-out infinite; } .smooth-spin { animation: smoothSpin 0.8s linear infinite; } ``` **Design tokens for animations:** - **Accent color:** `--accent: #6100DF` (violet) - **Durations:** 0.15s–1.8s (mostly 0.2s–0.3s for micro) - **Easing:** `ease-out`, `ease-in-out`, `linear` - **Focus accessibility:** Reduced motion support via `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` --- ### 6. BEST INSERTION POINTS FOR ANIMATED VISUALIZATION **Optimal locations (in order of impact):** 1. **Between Hero & AEO/GEO Section (Lines 189–191)** ✅ **RECOMMENDED** - Full-width, high visibility - Natural visual break after CTA buttons - ~400px–600px height for impact - Could replace the ambient glow with your animation 2. **After AEO/GEO Explanation (Lines 290–292)** ✅ **ALTERNATIVE** - Before Free Score section - Transitions naturally from conceptual to interactive 3. **Between Stats Bar & Features Grid (Lines 528–530)** ⚠️ SECONDARY - Lower visibility (below the fold for many users) - Good for supplementary visuals 4. **Inside Process Section (Lines 679–729)** ⚠️ SPECIAL USE - Could animate the 3-step timeline flow - Would replace the current vertical timeline visualization --- ## RECOMMENDATIONS FOR IMPLEMENTATION ### **Option A: CSS-only Animation** (Fastest, No Dependencies) - Use existing `@keyframes` and extend with custom animations - Create SVG-based visualizations with animated strokes - Leverage stagger delays for sequencing - **Best for:** Floating particles, animated charts, morphing shapes ### **Option B: Add Lightweight Library** **Recommended additions:** ```json "lottie-react": "^2.4.0" // JSON animations (smallest footprint) "framer-motion": "^11.0.0" // Declarative animations (heavier but powerful) ``` ### **Option C: Canvas/WebGL** ```json "three.js": "^r160" // 3D scenes (largest bundle impact) "pixi.js": "^8.0.0" // 2D GPU rendering (lighter than Three) ``` ### **Design Consistency Notes:** - Use accent color `#6100DF` (violet) for highlights - Respect reduced-motion preferences (already in globals.css) - Match animation durations: 0.2s–0.8s for smooth feel - Use backdrop blur (`backdrop-filter: blur(8px)`) for glassmorphism overlay --- ### 7. SECTION-BY-SECTION INSERTION POINT DETAILS **Best insertion location: After Hero Section, before "Qu'est-ce que l'AEO/GEO"** ``` Lines 155-189: HERO SECTION ↓ [INSERT ANIMATION HERE] ← 400-600px height ↓ Lines 191-290: AEO/GEO EXPLANATION ``` **HTML structure for insertion:** ```jsx {/* ── ANIMATED VISUALIZATION SECTION ── */}
{/* Background glow */}
{/* Your custom animated component here */}
``` **Styling template** (matches existing design): - Container: `max-w-[1440px] mx-auto px-6` - Background: `bg-white/[0.03]` with `border border-white/[0.06]` + `rounded-2xl` - Padding: `p-8 md:p-10` - Optional gradient border effect (used in Process section) --- ## SUMMARY TABLE | Aspect | Finding | |--------|---------| | **Home.tsx Size** | 885 lines (massive component) | | **Best insertion point** | After Hero (line ~189) — full-width, high visibility | | **Animation libraries** | None included; recommend Lottie or Framer Motion | | **Canvas libraries** | None included; would need to add Three.js or Pixi.js | | **Existing CSS** | Rich animation system: 10+ keyframes, micro-interactions, reduced-motion support | | **Color scheme** | Dark theme (#000000 bg, #6100DF violet accent) | | **Animation duration baseline** | 0.2s–0.8s (fast, micro-interactions) | | **Responsive breakpoints** | `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:` Tailwind classes | | **Accessibility** | Full reduced-motion support already implemented |
